abstract: We investigate how bots influence human-to-human interaction in online communities. In doing so, we distinguish between reflexive and supervisory bots delegated by community participants and moderators, respectively. We hypothesize that reflexive bot activity will reduce direct reciprocity and increase generalized reciprocity and that supervisory bot activity will reduce preferential attachment among human participants. Through an analysis of almost 70 million posts on the discussion communities on Reddit, a popular platform for online discussions, we found support for the hypotheses.

ob.ai_reason: Bot对在线社区影响，AI代理核心议题，行为与平台研究
ob.tldr: 研究Reddit上近7000万帖子，区分参与者和版主部署的反射型与监管型机器人，发现反射型机器人降低直接互惠、提升广义互惠，监管型机器人削弱人类偏好附着，验证假设。

title: The Effect of Bots on Human Interaction in Online Communities
title_zh: 机器人对在线社区人际互动的影响
